steps.title: Support bird advantage
steps.content: The text says the hypothesis was validated and that birds had a competitive advantage. A supporting finding should therefore show both competition for the boxes and a pattern in which birds, not wasps, tend to prevail when the species interact.

steps.title: Pick direct evidence
steps.content: Choice A discusses vacant boxes, Choice B shows wasps using manipulated boxes less than expected, and Choice D only says wasps were often present first. A finding that wasps used bird-excluded boxes more often and abandoned shared boxes while birds stayed would directly show bird advantage. The answer is C.
